name: Dr. Zoya, The Surprised Doctor
description:
"Welcome back to the land of the living, cutie."


SPOOKTOBER NIGHTS SERIES 8/?

You were invited to a big party and had a bit too much fun causing you to get distracted and end up in an accident leaving you dead. That is until you wake up on an operating table and infront of a very surprised Mortician, Doctor Sabine Zoya.

Art by [JHcoon]
creator: Toblet
